creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
gtkportscan, a simple portscanner.
Followed the categories precedent from strobe.

Comments welcome.

Fix: 

-Chris--uxKwSNijpxW3OSUethxcADeYJPIj1vhtDdo9tLEXLIBMvUrR
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.shar"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.shar"

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	gtkportscan
#	gtkportscan/files
#	gtkportscan/files/md5
#	gtkportscan/patches
#	gtkportscan/patches/patch-aa
#	gtkportscan/pkg
#	gtkportscan/pkg/COMMENT
#	gtkportscan/pkg/DESCR
#	gtkportscan/pkg/PLIST
#	gtkportscan/Makefile
#
echo c - gtkportscan
mkdir -p gtkportscan > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - gtkportscan/files
mkdir -p gtkportscan/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - gtkportscan/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >gtkportscan/files/md5 << 'END-of-gtkportscan/files/md5'
XMD5 (gtkportscan-1.0.tar.gz) = e58560900152082c0e9b63ba620488d7
END-of-gtkportscan/files/md5
echo c - gtkportscan/patches
mkdir -p gtkportscan/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - gtkportscan/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >gtkportscan/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-gtkportscan/patches/patch-aa'
X--- ../gtkscan.old/Makefile	Tue Mar  9 00:49:02 1999
X+++ Makefile	Thu Mar 11 16:20:27 1999
X@@ -1,13 +1,13 @@
X-CC=gcc
X-GTK_FLAGS=`gtk-config --cflags` `gtk-config  --libs` 
X+#CC=gcc
X+GTK_FLAGS=`gtk12-config --cflags` `gtk12-config  --libs` 
X 
X all: gtkportscan portscan
X 
X portscan: portscan.c
X-	$(CC) -O2 -Wall portscan.c -o portscan
X+	$(CC) -O2 -Wall portscan.c -o portscan ${CFLAGS}
X 
X gtkportscan: gtkportscan.c
X-	$(CC) -Wall $(GTK_FLAGS) gtkportscan.c -o gtkportscan -g
X+	$(CC) -Wall $(GTK_FLAGS) gtkportscan.c -o gtkportscan -g ${CFLAGS}
X 
X install:
X 	cp portscan /usr/local/bin
END-of-gtkportscan/patches/patch-aa
echo c - gtkportscan/pkg
mkdir -p gtkportscan/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - gtkportscan/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >gtkportscan/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-gtkportscan/pkg/COMMENT'
XA simple port scanner that prints out open ports.
END-of-gtkportscan/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - gtkportscan/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >gtkportscan/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-gtkportscan/pkg/DESCR'
XA simple port scanner written in Gtk+.  It does simple scanning
Xand printing of the open ports on the machine you are scanning.
XIncludes a command-line and GUI port scanner.
X
XHomepage:
Xhttp://www.calpoly.edu/~rbarrero/gtkportscan.html
XAuthor:
XRafael Barrero, Jr. <rbarrero@polymail.calpoly.edu>
X
X-Chris Piazza
Xcpiazza@home.net
END-of-gtkportscan/pkg/DESCR
echo x - gtkportscan/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >gtkportscan/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-gtkportscan/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/gtkportscan
Xbin/portscan
END-of-gtkportscan/pkg/PLIST
echo x - gtkportscan/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >gtkportscan/Makefile << 'END-of-gtkportscan/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	gtkportscan
X# Version required:	1.0
X# Date created:		11 March 1999
X# Whom:			Chris Piazza <cpiazza@home.net>
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	gtkportscan-1.0
XCATEGORIES=	security net
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.calpoly.edu/~rbarrero/
X
XMAINTAINER=	cpiazza@home.net
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=	gtk12.1:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk12
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/gtkscan
X
Xdo-install:
X	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/gtkportscan ${PREFIX}/bin
X	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/portscan ${PREFIX}/bin
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-gtkportscan/Makefile
exit
